part: D - Outcome Isolation / Leakage Control Design

outcomeFields.note: If used, must be in evaluation artifact only

allowedLocation: post-scoring evaluation artifact only — separate from ActiveScoringSnapshot
joinTiming: After: (1) scoring snapshot frozen, (2) asOfDate feature snapshot sealed, (3) PIT registry gate passed

leakageClassification.OUTCOME_LEAKAGE_DETECTED: Outcome field found in scoring snapshot or feature input
leakageClassification.PIT_JOIN_VIOLATION: Outcome joined before scoring snapshot was sealed
leakageClassification.SAFE_OBSERVABILITY_ONLY: No leakage detected; outcome properly isolated

existingEvidence.RealPriceOutcomeResolver: Already isolates entry (PIT-safe) from outcome (post-asOf) — reference implementation
existingEvidence.P3/P19_corpus_scan: P28D sweep confirmed 0 outcomeLeakageCount across 572 sampled rows

disclaimer: Paper design only. Not investment advice.
